pipeline_bugs_found_during_this_run: Bold markdown heading '## **REFERENCES**' not matched by heading regex — 0 references parsed, all 75 citations fell through as reference_not_in_list. Fixed in ref_resolver.py and check_claims.py.

Statistical IQR range '[13-41]' (from '15 [13-41] vs. 85 [30.50-195] days') misread as a citation range spanning references 13 through 41, generating 19 fake missing-reference flags. Fixed by capping citation-range width at 15 in expand_marker().
